mapper.select: SELECT id, year, description, sort_order FROM milestone WHERE is_visible = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, year, description, sort_order, is_visible, create_time FROM milestone ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO milestone (year, description, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{year}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE milestone SET is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id}
